steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: Discover
steps.subtitle: Listen, audit, align
steps.description: Two-week intake — stakeholder interviews, asset audit, alignment workshop. We leave with a one-page brief signed by everyone in the room.

steps.label: Step 2
steps.title: Strategy
steps.subtitle: Frame the bet
steps.description: We narrow to a single, measurable bet. One page, one team, one number to move.

steps.label: Step 3
steps.title: Build
steps.subtitle: Ship in increments
steps.description: Two-week increments, demo every Friday. Each increment is shippable on its own — no big-bang go-live.

steps.label: Step 4
steps.title: Scale
steps.subtitle: Compound the wins
steps.description: Ongoing optimisation, expansion into adjacent surfaces, and quarterly review against the original bet.

notes: Step 2 click-reveals to slide 50 (same target as the Strategy capsule on slide 2). Demonstrates the per-step revealSlide pattern; the rest of the steps are presenter-paced with ↑↓/jk/digits.
